component: YNX Data Fabric PostgreSQL transactional repository

test.name: TestPostgresLiveTransactionsConstraintsAndRecovery
assertions: checksum-locked initial migration applies and verifies
canonical event and Outbox commit atomically
exact replay is rejected as duplicate and sequence gaps are rejected
per-partition aggregate sequence rows agree with immutable event history during integrity audit
64 concurrent distinct aggregate partitions commit without cross-partition serialization aborts
two dispatchers cannot lease the same Outbox record
balanced Journal and Postings commit while deferred balance constraints reject an unbalanced Journal
Saga step events must match product and correlation authority
reconciliation status and coverage agree with immutable findings
payload-free pseudonymous analytics fact and Inbox marker commit together
erasure deletes prior analytics facts and later event delivery remains suppressed
erasure retention facts, repository integrity audit, and repository statistics are consistent

limitations: not a clean-commit or CI result
not a staging or production deployment
no process-kill-at-commit-boundary, replica failover, network partition, long-running concurrency, backup, restore, rollback, or capacity test
does not prove central Gateway, product, broker, warehouse, or public Testnet integration
